title: euphrasia nemorosa subsp. nitidula
intro: Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. nitidula, also known as woodland eyebright, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orobanchaceae. It is a medicinal plant traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. nitidula include its ability to soothe and calm the eyes, as well as its potential to alleviate respiratory issues and improve digestive health. Euphrasia nemorosa subsp. nitidula can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal properties, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural remedy enthusiasts.
